capture.sonyView: Sony A7IV at approximately 45 degree frontal view; filenames use __sony_front.

tray.construction: homemade cardboard tray; dimensions are approximate and not perfectly consistent
tray.calibrationGuidance: Use measured or fitted tray geometry for ingestion; do not assume a perfectly square, rigid 18 x 18 cm footprint.

notes: Raw videos are local and ignored by git via *.mp4.
Existing datasets/sony_object_inside_container_v0/calibration/sony_table_v0.calibration.json is synthetic/obsolete for this capture: it uses marker 7 and 0.04 m cube geometry.
A real capture calibration must be authored before video_to_tracks using cube IDs 2/3 and measured/fitted tray geometry.
IDs 6 and 7 were printed as big-cube tags but were not used as cube markers; they were repurposed as tray markers.

videos.view: iPhone, top view
notes: Original filename mentioned cube-3x3x3cm; capture notes state actual cube is 5x5x5 cm and cube tags are 35 mm IDs 2/3.
Top view is expected to preserve cube top tag visibility unless explicitly obstructed.
